description_long: This chair features a minimalist design with a gently contoured seat and backrest made from light-colored wood or wood laminate. The backrest includes a rectangular cut-out handle near the top, providing both a visual accent and practical grip for easy movement. The seat and back are smoothly curved for ergonomic comfort, with no visible upholstery or padding. Four slender, black metal legs support the chair, slightly splayed for stability and attached directly to the underside of the seat. The overall aesthetic is modern and functional, suitable for communal or public spaces. Its materials and construction suggest durability and ease of maintenance, making it ideal for high-traffic urban environments.
description: A modern chair with a light wood seat and backrest, featuring a cut-out handle and supported by four black metal legs. Its sleek, minimalist design is both functional and visually appealing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chair's curved seat and backrest, with the cut-out handle visible and two slender metal legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, the gentle curve of the backrest, and the cut-out handle at the top center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side, with the same curved profile and visible metal legs.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full backrest with the cut-out handle and the two rear metal legs.
